# isSIMInserted

**Instance Property**

A Boolean property that indicates whether a SIM is present.

## Declaration

```swift
var isSIMInserted: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

This value property is `true` if the system finds a SIM matching the `Info.plist` carrier information (MCC / MNC / GID1 / GID2).
title: isSIMInserted
